message:
refactor(core): streamline cx dispatcher and search/tui modules

cx.rs:
- Simplify the central event dispatcher by consolidating redundant
  match arms and reducing nesting depth, improving readability of
  the main event routing logic (-106 lines net reduction)

search/indexing.rs, search/daemon/worker.rs, tantivy_ingest.rs:
- Improve error context in search indexing paths
- Align function signatures for consistency with updated runtime API

tui/keymap.rs, tui/mod.rs, tui/rollout.rs:
- Minor formatting and import organization

browser/bootstrap.rs, pane_tiers.rs, vendored.rs:
- Alignment fixes and minor cleanup in module-level docs

No behavioral changes - the dispatcher produces identical routing
decisions, and search/tui public APIs are unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
